parameters.query:
SELECT
  id, email_id, thread_id, from_address, to_address, subject,
  body_preview, has_attachments, classification,
  reply_subject, reply_body, reply_html, reply_confidence,
  reply_action, source, matched_rule_id,
  tokens_used, created_at, reply_generated_at
FROM email_incoming_logs
WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.query.tenantId }}'::uuid
  AND reply_action = 'queue_human'
  AND reply_sent_at IS NULL
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN classification->>'priorite' = 'urgent' THEN 0
       WHEN classification->>'priorite' = 'haute' THEN 1
       WHEN classification->>'priorite' = 'normale' THEN 2
       ELSE 3 END,
  created_at ASC
LIMIT {{ $json.query.limit || 20 }}
OFFSET {{ $json.query.offset || 0 }}

SELECT
  id, from_address, to_address, subject,
  reply_subject, reply_body, reply_html,
  thread_id, email_id
FROM email_incoming_logs
WHERE id = '{{ $json.incomingLogId }}'::uuid
  AND tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid

UPDATE email_incoming_logs SET
  reply_subject = '{{ $('13. Preparer action').first().json.replySubject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  reply_body = '{{ $('13. Preparer action').first().json.replyText.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  reply_action = 'sent_approved',
  reply_sent_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('13. Preparer action').first().json.incomingLogId }}'::uuid

UPDATE email_incoming_logs SET
  reply_action = 'rejected',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.incomingLogId }}'::uuid
